posts.author: heidelbeere (Angela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hii

I have an Issue with renaming Tasks, Boards, Projects… and so on.
When i click on rename, it doesnt let me do it. I attached an GIF so it’s easier to understand.

I’m not pressing any keys which might lead to aborting the renaming process. Weirdly I can create and name new tasks without issues.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: heidelbeere (Angela)
posts.cookedHtml: UPDATE: I changed Browser from Chrome to Edge and renaming works again. I also deleted Emojis that were incorporated into the projects name.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
